channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

1. Middle East crisis live: Iranian negotiator says ‘we will not bow to any threats’ as Trump says US navy will blockade strait of Hormuz  The Guardian

  5. US Iran war talks LIVE: IRGC issues ‘deadly vortex’ warning after Trump's Strait of Hormuz blockade announcement  Hindustan Times

item.title: Asha Bhosle, the voice of Bollywood, has died aged 92 - NPR
item.description:
1. Asha Bhosle, the voice of Bollywood, has died aged 92  NPR
  2. Asha Bhosle: The sound of Bollywood dies aged 92  BBC
  3. Shamir Tandon recalls Asha Bhosle’s emotional words: ‘Ab mujhe bahut ache tarike se chale jana hai... khud se milna hai’  The Times of India
  4. Indian singer Asha Bhosle dies at 92, ending ‘extraordinary’ journey  CNN
  5. Asha Bhosle, One of India’s Most Beloved Singers, Dies at 92  The New York Times

item.title: ‘SNL’ Weekend Update Roasts JD Vance for Failed Iran Deal, ‘Weird’ Wife Comments - Rolling Stone
item.description:
1. ‘SNL’ Weekend Update Roasts JD Vance for Failed Iran Deal, ‘Weird’ Wife Comments  Rolling Stone
  2. JD Vance says talks failed due to Iran’s refusal to give up nuclear programme  The Guardian
  3. JD Vance oddly says wife Usha ‘has the right to skydive’ in Iran war ceasefire talk  The Independent
  4. The United States Is Telling Iran Not to Make a Nuclear Bomb  vocal.media
  5. Vance says US seeks firm Iranian pledge on nuclear program  Middle East Eye
